name: diffgate
description: Diff-aware, three-tiered code review gate. Reviews only changed lines, gates high-impact changes (secrets, schema drops, injection sinks, public-API drift) while letting safe edits fly through.

tools.name: diffgate_capabilities
tools.description: Learn which layers (core/graph/LLM) are live. Call first so you know which tools work and what the autonomy budget is.

tools.name: diffgate_analyze
tools.description: Check a file for risk findings before surfacing it. Returns tier (green/yellow/orange), blocking flag, and per-finding trust labels.

tools.name: diffgate_check_staged
tools.description: Scan all pending git changes across the repo. Returns aggregate tier and per-file findings.

tools.name: diffgate_deep_review
tools.description: Agentic blast-radius analysis for an orange finding (requires ai.enabled). Returns confirmed-risk / likely-safe / needs-human verdict.

tools.name: diffgate_explain
tools.description: Plain-English explanation and fix suggestion for a finding (requires ai.enabled).

tools.name: diffgate_guidelines
tools.description: Check the diff against the repo's AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules coding guidelines.

tools.name: diffgate_feedback
tools.description: Record a dismiss or confirm verdict on a finding. Dismissed findings are suppressed in all future reviews.

user_config.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
user_config.title: Anthropic API Key
user_config.description: Optional. Required only for diffgate_deep_review and diffgate_explain when provider is 'anthropic'. The core deterministic gate works without any key.
